---
title: 'Projects'
subtitle: 'Data analysis & visualization projects using R/Python.'
include-after-body: '../../src/scripts/responsive-tag-bar.html'
toc: false
sidebar: false
number-sections: false
back-to-top-navigation: false
reading-meta-enabled: false

listing:
  id: projects-listing
  contents: "*/index.*md"
  type: grid
  categories: true
  max-description-length: 100
  fields: [image, title, categories, author, date]
  grid-columns: 2
  image-height: "12rem"
  image-align: left
  image-placeholder: 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Pinn32/img/main/placeholders/Project.png'
  sort: 
    - "order asc"
    - "date desc"
    - "title asc"
  sort-ui: [title, date]
  filter-ui: true
  page-size: 20
---
